creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
I have asked the same question 6 times now and still do not have an answer. (See comment #29, comment ##33, comment #35, comment #37, comment #39 and comment #41) I will try to ask it again because I cannot perform the test without this information.

In the sshd_config, do you want me to enable GSSAPI or PAM?
